zh.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily是Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon和Isabella的女兒，於1100年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多。她於1117年與Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1135年2月8日在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫享年35歲，埋葬在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫三 馬爾科 埃萬傑利斯塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily是Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon和Isabella的女儿，于1100年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多。她于1117年与Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1135年2月8日在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫享年35岁，埋葬在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫三 馬爾科 埃萬傑利斯塔。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of   Casteel   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Casteel
meanings: Altered form of mainly northern French Ducastel: topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, from Picard castel, Old French chastel ‘castle’ (see Castel 5, compare 2 below); or a habitational name for someone from any of several places called Le Castel. Compare Castile .
Dutch: from kasteel ‘castle’, hence a topographic name or a metonymic occupational name for someone who lived or worked in a castle.

nameMeanings.name: Elvira
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name of Germanic (Visigothic) origin , very common in the Middle Ages. It was not used in the English-speaking world until the 19th century, when it was made familiar as the name of the long-suffering wife of  Don Juan , both in  Mozart's  opera Don Giovanni (  1789 ) and in  Byron's  satirical epic poem Don Juan (  1819–24 ). In his comedy Blithe Spirit  Noel Coward  used it as the name of  Charles Condomine's  first wife, who returns to haunt him. It is also the name of the heroine of the Swedish film Elvira Madigan (  1967 ), directed by  Bo Widerberg , a romantic tragedy about a pair of lovers who would rather die than be separated.

en.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily was born in 1100, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain as the daughter of Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon and Isabella. She married Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile in 1117. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 February 1135, in Palermo, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 35, and was buried in San Marco Evangelista, Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily est née en 1100, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, fille de Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon et Isabella. Elle a épousé Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile en 1117. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 février 1135, à Palermo, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à San Marco Evangelista, Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie.

Sie hat 1117 Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Februar 1135 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Palermo, Sizilien, Italien und wurde in San Marco Evangelista, Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily è nata il nel 1100 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna come figlia di Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon e Isabella. Lei sposato Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile nel 1117. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1135, nel Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a San Marco Evangelista, Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicilyは1100年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでAlfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y LeonとIsabellaの娘として生まれた。1117年にRoger II de Sicile Roi de Sicileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1135年2月8日にイタリアシシリアプアラーモで35歳で死去し，イタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモサン マルコ エヴァンジェリスタにて埋葬された。

ko.Cattedrale di Palermo ,Palermo, Città Me: 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모 산 마코 이반그리스타
ko.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily(은)는 1100년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon(와)과 Isabella의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1117년 Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 2월 8일 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모 산 마코 이반그리스타에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily nasceu em 1100, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha filha de Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon e Isabella. Ela casou-se com Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile em 1117. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1135, em Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em San Marco Evangelista, Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália.

ru.Cattedrale di Palermo ,Palermo, Città Me: сан марко эвангелиста, пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Elvira de Castile Queen of Sicily родилась в 1100 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. Её родителей звали Alfonso VI de Galicia Rey de Castilla y Leon и Isabella. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile в 1117 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 февраля 1135 г. в местности пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности сан марко эвангелиста, пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия.
